'''Oejoe Hitewa''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who, along with his accomplices, [[Stu Hemphawar]] and [[Ruceba Ahid]], worked out of a tiny apartment close to the [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Active during the years prior to the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], the [[Senate Bureau of Intelligence/Legends|Senate Bureau of Intelligence]] issued a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] for their arrest, when the group was implicated in trafficking illicit material throughout the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. The entire group was eventually hunted down and captured by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Posted Bounty==
*'''Wanted Alive:''' Oejoe Hitewa
